zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy Rocliffe於大約1415年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Robert Roucliffe45歲，母親Margaret Aldborough22歲。他和Joan Burgh至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1460年3月28日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy Rocliffe于大约1415年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Robert Roucliffe45岁，母亲Margaret Aldborough22岁。他和Joan Burgh至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1460年3月28日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Rocliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rawcliffe
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in Lancashire, Yorkshire, and Cumbria called Rawcliffe or Rockcliffe. In most cases the placename is derived from Old Norse rauthr ‘red’ + klif ‘cliff, steep hill’. One in Lancashire is probably from Old English rā ‘roe deer’ + clif ‘cliff, steep hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy Rocliffe was born about 1415, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Roucliffe, was 45 and his mother, Margaret Aldborough, was 22. He had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Joan Burgh. He died before 28 March 1460, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy Rocliffe est né environ 1415, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Roucliffe, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret Aldborough, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Joan Burgh. Il est décédé avant 28 mars 1460, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy Rocliffe um 1415 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Roucliffe 45 und seine Mutter Margaret Aldborough 22. Er hatte mit Joan Burgh mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb vor 28. März 1460 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy Rocliffe è nato il circa 1415 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Roucliffe, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Aldborough, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Joan Burgh. Morì prima del 28 marzo 1460, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy Rocliffeが約1415年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Roucliffeは45歳，母Margaret Aldboroughは22歳であった。彼はJoan Burghとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1460年3月28日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy Rocliffe(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Roucliffe(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Aldborough(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Joan Burgh(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 3월 28일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy Rocliffe nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Roucliffe, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Aldborough, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Joan Burgh. Ele faleceu antes 28 de março de 1460, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy Rocliffe родился около 1415 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Roucliffe было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Aldborough, 22. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Joan Burgh. Он умер перед 28 марта 1460 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy Rocliffe nació aproximadamente 1415, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Roucliffe, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margaret Aldborough, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas con Joan Burgh. Murió antes de 28 de marzo de 1460, en su pueblo.
